# Friday {#friday}


10-11H PLENARY SESSION – PRESENTATIONS AND FINAL FEEDBACK 

●	Give a PowerPoint presentation
o	Each (group) presentation should have a duration of ± 20 minutes.
o	The structure of the presentation should follow the steps of the intervention mapping protocol and should include a summary of tasks of IM steps 1-5

●	Give constructive feedback to your fellow students

<18H FINALIZE PRESENTATIONS

•	Process the feedback you have been given by prof Rob Ruiter to improve your slides.

o	Email the improved group presentation saved in PDF-format to N.Y.L.Oei@uva.nl before 18h
